channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rude and racist graffiti, 2nd April
item.description:
Pathway in the park and the bins have been graffitied with racist slurs and rude phrases which makes the park unsightly and uncomfortable for everyone. This needs to be removed asap as this could incite more hate crime.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerbstone trip hazard unsatisfactory repair, 2nd April
item.description:
This kerbstone was reported previously reference 9190689, it is outside 61 Morley Hill EN2 0BL. It needs removing and resetting properly. Instead some tarmac has been stuffed around the kerb and it is still a trip hazard. The tarmac is very soft and just crumbling away. This is a very poor repair and still dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morley Hill, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked sewers at the rear of lingfield crescent, 2nd April
item.description:
Resident reporting at the rear of Lingfield Crescent before the railyway line there are blocked sewers and this is causing flooding in the road. Please could someone look into this there are around 8 to 10 blocked sewers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers left on road post parking suspension, 2nd April
item.description:
Please can these be removed urgently as they are blocking parking spaces. Suspension ended 31/3/26. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On side of zebra crossing next to corner of solent road, 2nd April
item.description:
This was fixed a couple of weeks ago, however as my advise to raise the drain where the pothole keeps appearing was ignored, the pothole has come back again. If you want to fix this every month thats fine, but the drain needs to be fixed to ensure a more permenant fix and to stop wasting money.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Mill Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water all over pavement for several weeks, 2nd April
item.description:
Water all over pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Wood Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 2nd April
item.description:
Large amount of potholes all along pickhurst lane up towards hayes high street, if this could be looked at JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all along Westcombe Hill, 2nd April
item.description:
Rubbish bags have been dumped yet again and foxes have strewn it all along the road from the bike shop as far as fitness studio . This is disgusting and unsanitary and will encourage vermin, please resolve the problem by giving flats above shops or shops themselves alternative ways to dispose of their rubbish as leaving their rubbish bags out at night is not working.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd April
item.description:
This TV box and other litter was on Dursley Road a few days ago and they seem to have moved it here after it was not collected by the bin men

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balchen Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 211 Albany Street NW1 4AB, 2nd April
item.description:
The drain is almost full. After completion of roadworks recently, a lot of debris from the roadworks was left in the drain. After recent strong winds, material from the trees on the other side of the road are now in the drain too. I tried to attach a photo but it didn’t work.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 197, Albany Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned lime bike., 2nd April
item.description:
Abandoned lime bike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillbrow Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed waste collection - over 3 weeks, 2nd April
item.description:
Our household and recycling waste collection has been missed for over 3 weeks. We have reported it through the Council's missed waste collection online channels and by email and telephone and we haven't heard back. This is also attracting fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rendlesham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste dropped by Veolia operatives, 2nd April
item.description:
Garden waste dropped by Veolia operatives with no attempt to clear it up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Goodhart Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags on grass, 2nd April
item.description:
Household rubbish bags all ripped open on the grass. Used nappies on the grass a bit further down.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rancliffe Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip - Fridge freezer, debris, 2nd April
item.description:
Fly tipped - Fridge freezer and debris.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped bulk bags, 2nd April
item.description:
Multiple bulk bags of building waste, potential arson targets.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rainsborough Avenue, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Countdown not working. Bee broken for weeks., 2nd April
item.description:
The countdown is not working at all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 173, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerously loose street sign - could cause injury/damage, 2nd April
item.description:
The permit holder parking street sign is dangerously loose, the pavement is broken and needs urgent repair - this could cause injury to people or cars/property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Toulmin Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass in a/way side New Hope Church Station Rd, 2nd April
item.description:
Broken glass in a/way side New Hope Church Station Rd - leading to Hatherley Road...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated dog fouling by the same person daily, 2nd April
item.description:
A man walks his dog along Lesney Park each night between 10:30 and 11pm and stops outside 61 Lesney Park and his dog fouls and he does not pick it up. I’m sick of picking it up to avoid the school children from Christ Church primary school treading in it !!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
